title: AshenOG's Green Debris!
description: A texture pack that makes ancient debris green for increased visibility!
body:
THE NEW WAY TO MINE DEBRIS!!!

AshenOG's Green Debris Texture Pack makes it super easy to see ancient debris against the colors of netherrack, blackstone, soulsand, and other nether-themed blocks.
![Intro Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5579fc7c6433eb325a75effb619f9136a5a0d160_0.webp)
WHY GREEN ANCIENT DEBRIS???

Green is a complimentary color to red, one of the most common colors in the nether. Therefore, green will contrast the greatest againts red, making it a great choice to use in such a red-heavy dimension
![Desc Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80398df5d64a4b5826453b53b6bc26330a7b3118.png)
[NOTES: THIS TEXTURE PACK DOES NOT INCLUDE A NO-FOG TEXURE FOR THE LAVA. IF YOU'D LIKE TO HAVE THAT, PLEASE SEARCH FOR A NO-FOG TEXTURE PACK ELSEWHERE. ALSO, THIS TEXTURE PACK SHOULD BE SERVER-FRIENDLY, BUT JUST TO BE SURE THAT THIS PACK COMPLIES WITH YOUR SERVERS RULES, PLEASE ASK YOUR MODERATORS ABOUT THIS BEFORE USING TO AVOID RISK OF BAN]
